facts.claim: Nassau is the capital and largest city of The Bahamas.

Nassau (/ˈnæsɔː/ NASS-aw) is the capital and largest city of The Bahamas. It is on the island of New Providence, which has a population of 296,522, 74.26% of the country's total population.[3] Nassau is commonly defined as a primate city, dwarfing all other towns in the country.[4] It is the centre of commerce, education, law, administration, and media of the country.
